latex: There are $20$ students in Ms. Rivera's science class, $32$ students in Mr. Holt's science class, $28$ students in Ms. Chen's science class, and $16$ students in Mr. Patel's science class. All of these students are being split into groups for a field trip to the planetarium, and each group must contain the same number of students. If there are $8$ chaperones for the field trip and each chaperone can take one group of students, how many students will be in each group?
